_comment: Canonical STRUCTURAL contract for the Nitrograph MCP tool surface. Both the hosted API server (api/src/routes/mcp.ts) and the CLI stdio server (cli/src/server.ts) must satisfy this exactly. Prose descriptions may differ between surfaces; structure (tool set, required fields, filter shape) must not. Keep this file byte-identical in both repos. If you change the tool contract, update both copies and both tests will enforce it.
